jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - NAREDCO - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
NAREDCO, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NAREDCO:
NAREDCO is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NAREDCO!
